decisions.name: Are_you_Landlord_Agent_or_LA_decision
decisions.label: Are you Landlord, Agent or LA decision

rightValue.stringValue: Agent registering exemptions for a landlord

Flow.description: Screen flow that creates a case record for Landlords, Agents and Local Authorities to submit a request for help and support

formulas.name: fla_SupportLevel

Flow.label: PRSE Create Help/Support Request

value.stringValue: What do you need support with
I cannot log in to my account|Something has gone wrong with the service|I have a complaint|Other
I cannot log in to my account|Something has gone wrong with the service|I have a complaint|Other
What do you need support with?
Please select what you need support with
Landlord|Agent registering exemptions for a landlord|Local authority user
Landlord|Agent registering exemptions for a landlord|Local authority user
Please select one of the options
Thank you for submitting your request for support

Your reference number is: {!Get_Help_Support_Case_Ref.CaseNumber}

Please make a note of this number.

We aim to respond to requests within 5 working days.

Contact form for digital support

We do not provide advice on what type of exemption you should register. If you need help understanding exemptions, you can:

  • read our guidance
  • contact your local authority
  • seek legal advice

Please provide your details so that we can contact you.

rightValue.stringValue: Agent registering exemptions for a landlord

value.stringValue:
Contact form for digital support

Please provide your details so that we can contact you.
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
Please describe the issue you need support with
If you are contacting us about a specific exemption, provide the exemption number or property address.
Please describe the issue you need support with
What do you need support with

I cannot log in to my account|I cannot link my new account to my previously registered exemptions|Something has gone wrong with the service|I have changed my agent and want to move my exemption|I have a complaint|Other

I cannot log in to my account|I cannot link my new account to my previously registered exemptions|Something has gone wrong with the service|I have changed my agent and want to move my exemption|I have a complaint|Other
What do you need support with?
Please select what you need support with
What do you need support with
I have a question about the policy or guidance|I need an account created|I cannot log in to my account|Something has gone wrong with the service|I need to change my permission levels|Other
I have a question about the policy or guidance|I need an account created|I cannot log in to my account|Something has gone wrong with the service|I need to change my permission levels|Other
What do you need support with?
Please select what you need support with
